(*example.com/conc.File).Close effects={spawns:Unbounded chan:[Make,Send,Recv,Close,Select] locks:[Lock,Unlock,RLock,RUnlock]} requires=0 ensures=0 provenance=Inferred

example.com/conc.Fan$1 effects={spawns:None chan:[Close] locks:[]} requires=0 ensures=0 provenance=Inferred
example.com/conc.init effects={spawns:Unbounded chan:[Make,Send,Recv,Close,Select] locks:[Lock,Unlock,RLock,RUnlock]} requires=0 ensures=0 provenance=Inferred
